principle: Region reflects where the model developer is headquartered. Open-weight models are attributed to their original developer, not the host that serves them. 'Other' is the honest catch-all for everything that does not sit cleanly in Asia, Europe or the US (Canada, Israel, the UAE, undisclosed labs, and OpenRouter's own aggregated 'other' row).

developer_notes.google: Google DeepMind - US/UK; attributed to US as corporate HQ.
developer_notes.meta-llama: Meta - Menlo Park, US (Llama open weights).
developer_notes.nvidia: NVIDIA - Santa Clara, US (Nemotron open weights).
developer_notes.poolside: Poolside - headquartered in San Francisco, US (founding team part-European; HQ used for classification). Flagged as a borderline call worth re-checking.
developer_notes.mistralai: Mistral AI - Paris, France. The only European-headquartered developer currently in the routed top tier.
developer_notes.openrouter/owl-alpha: A cloaked/stealth model served by OpenRouter for an undisclosed lab. Origin is not public, so it is classified 'Other' rather than guessed. Re-classify if the developer is revealed.
